title: createrepo_c bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[0.20.1-4]
- Add git build require, needed for binary patches (RHEL-67689)

[0.20.1-3]
- Add zstd compression support (RHEL-67689)
